product_page.title_descriptor: 100% Cotton Twill, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 360 gr/m'2
product_page.page_title: 100% Cotton Twill, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 360 gr/m'2 - ArWoWear T11 Chem Pro- Ariteks
product_page.spec_line: 360 g/m², 100% Cotton, Vat Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric
description_blocks: ArWoWear T11 Chem Pro is heavy weight 360 g/m², vat dyed, chemical resistant,100% cotton merserized workwear fabric.
It is usefull for outdoor winter working conditions.
With water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function.
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)

images.title: Protection Technical Textiles
images.context_text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.

images.title: ArWoWear T11 Chem Pro
images.context_text: ArWowear T11 Chem Pro is heavy weight 360 g/m² , vat dyed, chemical resistant ,100% cotton merserized workwear fabric. It is usefull for outdoor winter working conditions. With water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function. Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
Ar Wo Wear T11 Chem Pro
360 g/m² , 100% Cotton, Vat Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric

ArWowear T11 Chem Pro is heavy weight 360 g/m² , vat dyed, chemical resistant ,100% cotton merserized workwear fabric. It is usefull for outdoor winter working conditions. With water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function. Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034) Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Cotton (CO) EN ISO 2076 Yarn Warp:8/1Ne; Weft:8/1Ne EN ISO 2060 Weight 360 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1600 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp>1600N; Weft>1000N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp>30N; Weft>25N EN ISO 13937-2 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 6-7 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 4-5 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Coveralls Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Chemical Resistant Yes EN ISO 13034 Technical Documents >> ArWoWear T11 Chem Pro Data Sheet Certificates EN ISO 13034 EN ISO 105 B02 EN ISO 105 C06 EN ISO 105 E04 EN ISO 105 N01 EN ISO 105 N02 EN ISO 105 X11 EN ISO 105 X12
